name: return_just_below_boundary_resets
description: current_return is just below (dynamic_activation - DEADBAND). Ticks reset to 0 (full reset, NOT decrement).
derivation: dynamic_activation = 1.0 (unclamped). threshold = 1.0 - 0.2 = 0.8. current_return (0.79) < 0.8 -> ticks RESET to 0 (NOT 4 - 1). 0 < 5 -> not locked. not locked -> stop = base_stop_level = 0.2. CRITICAL: starting with current_hold_ticks=4, decrement would yield 3, while full reset yields 0. Catches an impl that decrements rather than resets.
